description: Before clearing land for a new waste dump, an environmental officer surveys the area for protected species.

nodes.task_description: Review the planned land clearing area on a map.

expected_outcome.expected: The area to be cleared is identified.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a field survey of the area to identify any protected flora or fauna.

expected_outcome.expected: The survey identifies a population of a protected orchid species within the clearing footprint.

nodes.task_description: Develop a plan to translocate the protected orchids to a suitable, safe habitat before clearing begins.

expected_outcome.expected: A species management plan is created and approved, allowing the project to proceed while protecting biodiversity.
